name: Cracked-Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, heat the water to boiling; add cracked wheat.
2. Cook on medium-high heat for approximately 6 minutes until all the water is absorbed; stir occasionally with a wooden spoon; remove pan from heat; allow cracked wheat to cool to room temperature.
3. Place all ingredients, including cooled cracked wheat, in the bread machine pan and select the "Bread" setting.
4. After the baking cycle ends, remove bread from the pan, place on a cake rack, and allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
